sourcePrompt: A PT-76 amphibious light tank of the NVA, about seven meters long and strikingly low - a steel boat on tracks. A flat wide hull with a boat-nosed bow and a folded trim vane lying flat on it, a small rounded pancake turret with a 76mm gun mounted well forward, and six large evenly spaced road wheels per side with no return. Low-poly, +X forward, ground at Y=0; named pivots for moving parts.
